mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY config_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_config(config_key, config_value, description, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), description = VALUES(description), update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
